---
name: External Review Finding
about: Record an outside audit or watcher finding against the live artifact
title: "[Review] "
labels: external-review
assignees: ''
---

## Source

- reviewer or operator
- bundle or artifact reviewed
- date

## Finding

State the issue clearly and concretely.

## Severity

- low
- medium
- high
- critical

## Affected Paths

- file or contract
- deployment artifact section
- runtime service or script

## Reproduction Or Evidence

Include the exact output, report excerpt, or transaction reference.

## Proposed Fix

Describe the expected remediation or follow-up.
